# Branch Strategy

## Long-lived branches

- main: production-ready state
- develop: integration branch for ongoing work
- security: security hardening and vulnerability remediation
- backend: backend services work
- api: API and contract work
- auth: authentication and authorization work
- monitoring: observability and alerting
- infrastructure: deployment and environment provisioning
- deployment: release orchestration and deployment workflows
- multi-agent: multi-agent orchestration and orchestration logic

## Supporting branches

- feature/* for isolated work
- bugfix/* for fixes
- hotfix/* for urgent production fixes
- release/* for release preparation
